SHORT NAME: — 

LONG NAME: PRE_ICL_MO_COPAY_2M 

TYPE: NUM 

LENGTH: 8 

SOURCE: CMS (HPMS Files) 

VALUES: — 

COMMENT: This variable was new in 2013. Plans that use a coinsurance percentage amount rather than a co-
payment amount will not have a value in this field; see instead the corresponding coinsurance variable 
called (PRE_ICL_MO_COINS_2M).
